name: ssot-tb-goal
description: SSOT->TB outcome goals: generic scenario-derived TB, passing simulation, VCD/coverage for sim_debug, or precise escalation

tasks.content: [Goal 1/4] Produce SSOT-derived TB artifacts on disk
tasks.activeForm: Building generic SSOT-derived TB for {ip} — attempt {loop_count}/{max_loop_iterations}
tasks.detail: End state required: TB files exist and are derived from the current SSOT and <ip>/verify/equivalence_goals.json, not fixed scenario assumptions. Read SSOT, equivalence goals, RTL filelist, and RTL top. Choose cocotb unless SSOT/project requires SV-only. Write test_<ip>.py + test_runner.py or tb_<ip>.sv + scenario tasks. Include clock/reset, DUT port mapping, protocol helpers, scenario tests, workflow/tb-gen/runtime/equivalence_scoreboard.py (`EquivalenceScoreboard`) or equivalent FunctionalModel/model-adapter expected/got assertions, equivalence goal IDs, scoreboard_events.jsonl emission, coverage bins, and VCD dump setup. Any helper that logs [FAIL] or tracks failed checks must raise/assert so failures cannot be hidden behind a PASS summary.
tasks.criteria:
TB artifacts exist and are non-empty
python3 workflow/tb-gen/runtime/equivalence_scoreboard.py <ip> --root . --self-check passes when FunctionalModel is present
Every SSOT scenario maps to a test/subtest
Every non-blocked equivalence goal maps to a scoreboard event row or precise blocker
Every top-level DUT port is driven/monitored or intentionally tied with rationale
Every SSOT scenario has a real assertion that fails the simulator on mismatch
Coverage bins exist for scenarios/features
VCD dumping is configured
No RTL files were modified
tasks.exit_condition: real SSOT-derived TB artifacts on disk

tasks.content: [Goal 2/4] Run simulation and reach PASS or precise failure classification
tasks.detail: Run the real command: cocotb pytest runner or iverilog/vvp. If failures are TB-only, fix TB and rerun. If failures are RTL-vs-SSOT behavior, stop and prepare [SIM ESCALATE] blocks. Do not approve prose-only. Do not change SSOT expected results to observed DUT behavior. The final state must be either all scenario tests pass or every failing behavior is classified with exact evidence.
tasks.criteria:
python3 workflow/tb-gen/scripts/check_tb_python_compile.py <ip> --root . passed after final TB edit and before simulation
Simulation command was executed after final TB edit
The exact report command runs without external PATH overrides or hidden setup
Compile/elaboration succeeded or failure is classified
PASS path has all tests passing, all required equivalence goals covered by scoreboard_events.jsonl, and no [FAIL] markers or failed-check counters
FAIL path has expected/got lines and suspected owner workflow
No old simulation output is reused as final evidence

tasks.content: [Goal 3/4] Emit sim_debug artifacts: VCD, coverage, report
tasks.detail: On PASS path, ensure <ip>/sim/<ip>.vcd, <ip>/sim/scoreboard_events.jsonl, <ip>/cov/coverage_functional.json, <ip>/sim/coverage_report.md, and latest per-run results XMLs or sim_report.txt exist. TB-gen may write raw functional bins and waveform setup, but final <ip>/cov/coverage.json, static line/branch/FSM evidence, and SSOT coverage signoff must come from the generic coverage workflow and reusable SSOT summary script. Do not create an IP-specific Verilator harness, coverage summary Python, fixed bus/memory template, or one-off parser under <ip>/tb/ to force coverage. If generic coverage cannot measure an SSOT coverage_goals metric, emit an explicit evidence-gap escalation instead of DONE. If VCD is missing or a .vcd file is binary/non-parseable, fix generic dump setup and rerun simulation or emit a waveform-evidence escalation.
tasks.criteria:
Waveform exists and is inspectable as ASCII VCD, or real binary format plus converter is available
scoreboard_events.jsonl exists and covers required equivalence goal IDs
coverage_functional.json exists and reports raw functional hit/total/pct
coverage_report.md exists
latest results XML or sim_report.txt exists
Coverage source is labeled accurately
Final coverage.json is produced by the common coverage stage from SSOT/fcov_plan plus raw evidence
Static line/branch/FSM metrics are produced by generic coverage workflow artifacts or explicitly escalated
No IP-specific coverage harness or one-off coverage summary script was added under <ip>/tb/

tasks.detail: PASS branch: emit [SSOT RESULT] tb-gen DONE with module, TB files, sim command, test count, coverage path, VCD path, and Handoff: sim_debug. FAIL branch: emit [SIM ESCALATE] -> rtl-gen block per failing behavior with module, file/signal if known, test, expected, got, hypothesis. EVIDENCE-GAP branch: emit [SIM ESCALATE] -> tb-gen or coverage for stale results, non-parseable waveform, or SSOT coverage goals that were not instrumented. Do not claim DONE if any failure or evidence gap remains.
tasks.criteria:
PASS branch includes real artifact paths and command evidence
FAIL branch includes precise escalation blocks
Evidence-gap branch names exact missing/stale/non-parseable artifacts
No simulation/coverage result is fabricated
Next owner is sim_debug on PASS or rtl-gen/ssot-gen/tb-gen/coverage on escalation
